name: Little Resort Simulator
short_description: Relaxed first person simulator where you manage a little hotel, you customize the Customer's room furniture, clean rooms, serve drinks at the Bar, serve buffet food in the eating area and unlock more facilities
detailed_description:
Relaxed first person simulator where you manage a little hotel / resort by the beach.

You start by renovating and customize the customer's room furniture to your taste, then the first customers will start appearing at the reception.

With the profits you can unlock more Rooms so you can expand the number of Customer's your resort can have

Also in very little time you will start unlocking more facilities in the resort, where you can do varied things like give massages, serve drinks, have a stockable eating area, throw the lifeguard buoy to the customers having trouble swimming in the ocean. Unlocking each facility increases the variety of the gameplay, so each day you can do different things in a relaxed way

Modifying the Customer's room furniture

Cleaning the Customer's room at the start of the day

After the customers have been checked in at the Reception, and spent a day at your hotel you will need to clean their rooms at the start of the day, by picking the dirty towels, cleaning the floor stains, restocking the room's clean towels and lastly make their beds

Making drinks at the bar

Unlocking the Bar allows you to make multiple drink types and serve them to your Customers

Swimming pool

The Swimming pool can be unlocked / repaired, so your customers can enjoy getting some sun and rest on the swimming pool chairs, and in return you get every day extra profit per Customer's Room

Stocking food at the Eating area

At the unlockable Eating Area you can order food supplies, after they arrive in cardboard boxes just outside the building you can store them and stock the food on the food boards in the eating area

Giving massages to Customers at the Massage Parlor

On the unlockable Massage Parlor, you can give massages to the sore Customers

Helping out Customers that are having trouble swimming by throwing a Buoy at them

At the beach you can unlock the Lifeguard Buoy, and if the Customers are having trouble swimming in the Ocean you can throw the buoy at them

supported_languages: English, French, Portuguese - Portugal, German, Spanish - Spain, Italian, Dutch, Greek, Japanese, Korean, Polish, Simplified Chinese, Ukrainian
